directors.name: Jim Anderson
directors.bio_summary: Jim Anderson has served as a director since October 2008 and currently serves as Chief Executive Officer of Moly-Cop since November 2017. Previously he was Managing Director and Operating Partner at CHAMP Private Equity and President and CEO of The Gavilon Group, LLC. His career spans agricultural processing and trading, including senior roles at ConAgra Grain Companies, CT Malt, United Malt Holdings, and Ferruzzi USA.

directors.name: Wayne Hoovestol
directors.bio_summary: Wayne Hoovestol has served as Chairman of the Board since October 2008 and as a director since March 2006. He previously served as CEO and COO of Green Plains and has been operating Hoovestol Inc., a trucking company, since 1978, and is President of Lone Mountain Truck Leasing, which he founded in 2005. He has been involved in the ethanol industry as an investor since 1995 and served on the board of CapSource Financial, Inc.

directors.name: Ejnar Knudsen
directors.bio_summary: Ejnar Knudsen joined the board in May 2016 and is founder and CEO of AGR Partners, overseeing investments totaling over $400 million in food processors and agribusinesses. Previously he was co-portfolio manager of Passport Capital's Agriculture Fund and EVP of Western Milling. He also spent 10 years with Rabobank managing a loan portfolio and venture capital investments.

directors.name: Todd Becker
directors.bio_summary: Todd Becker has served as President and Chief Executive Officer and director since 2009. He previously served as CEO of VBV LLC and Executive Vice President of Sales and Trading at Global Ethanol, and worked for ten years at ConAgra Foods, Inc. in various management positions. He also served on the board of Hillshire Brands Company from 2012 to 2014.

directors.name: Thomas Manuel
directors.bio_summary: Thomas Manuel has served as a director since May 2015 and is CEO and Founder of Nu-Tek Food Science LLC, a food ingredients processing company, since August 2011. Previously he served as CEO of Aventine Renewable Energy, Inc. and Managing Director of International Strategy Advisors, LLC, and held various senior management positions with ConAgra Foods, Inc. from 1977 to 2002.

directors.name: Brian Peterson
directors.bio_summary: Brian Peterson has served as a director since May 2005 and currently serves as President and CEO of Whiskey Creek Enterprises. He previously served as Green Plains' Executive Vice President in charge of site development and was the sole founder and owner of Superior Ethanol LLC, which was acquired by Green Plains in 2006. He has owned and operated grain farming entities for over twenty years.

directors.name: Alain Treuer
directors.bio_summary: Alain Treuer has served as Vice Chairman of the Board since August 2015 and as a director since October 2008. He is Chairman and CEO of Tellac Reuert Partners (TRP SA), a global investment firm, since 2005, and was previously Chairman and CEO of TIGC, a global telecommunications company he founded in 1992 and sold in 2001. He was also a founder of VBV LLC, which merged with Green Plains in 2008.

directors.name: James Crowley
directors.bio_summary: James Crowley has served as a director since October 2008 and is Chairman and Managing Partner of Old Strategic, LLC since July 2006. His previous experience includes service as Chairman and Managing Partner of Strategic Research Institute, President of Global Investment and Merchant Banking at Prudential Securities, and investment banking at Smith Barney Harris Upham & Co. He currently serves on the board and as Chairman of the Audit Committee of Core Molding Technologies.

directors.name: Gene Edwards
directors.bio_summary: Gene Edwards has served as a director since June 2014 and previously served as Executive Vice President and Chief Development Officer of Valero Energy Corporation until his retirement in April 2014, where he had a 32-year career. He was a key driver in Valero's entry into the ethanol business. He also served on the board of directors of CST Brands, Inc. from May 2013 to December 2013.

directors.name: Gordon Glade
directors.bio_summary: Gordon Glade has served as a director since December 2007 and was formerly a shareholder and President and CEO of Amur Equipment Financing (formerly AXIS Capital Inc.) from 1996 to 2016. He is an investor in several ethanol companies and serves as Vice President and director of the Edgar and Frances Reynolds Foundation, Inc. and as a director of Heartland Agriculture, LLC and Brunswick State Bank.

executive_officers.name: Todd A. Becker
executive_officers.title: President and Chief Executive Officer (and Director)

executive_officers.name: Michelle S. Mapes
executive_officers.title: Chief Legal and Administration Officer and Corporate Secretary

extraction_notes: All director ages, tenures, roles, and committee memberships were clearly stated in the proxy. Tenure years were calculated based on the stated 'director since' year relative to the 2020 annual meeting filing date. Ejnar Knudsen is listed as a director of Ridley Corp. (RIC.ASX), which is a publicly listed company on the Australian Securities Exchange; Opal Foods and Materra Farming appear to be private companies and were excluded from other_public_boards. Todd Becker's other_public_boards list is empty as his board service at Hillshire Brands was explicitly past (2012-2014). Wayne Hoovestol's role is normalized to 'chair' as he is Chairman of the Board.
